summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 11 warning, 15 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: ЁЯЯб bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:113 тАФ `isSafeRegex` alternation check rejects all `(a|b)+` patterns including safe ones. Deliberate safety-first trade-off, but document the restriction for runbook authors.

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:113` тАФ `isSafeRegex` alternation check rejects all grouped-alternation+quantifier patterns including safe ones like `(get|set)+`; overly conservative but errs safely for repo-local YAML

ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:83-90` тАФ `stripInlineComment` returns quoted values unchanged, so `"hello" # comment` produces a literal string with the hash included; only matters for exotic YAML patterns not used in built-in runbooks
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:228` тАФ Keyword substring matching (intentional) means `api` matches inside `capital`; mitigated by high `minScore` thresholds (4) on built-in runbooks
ЁЯЯб SPEC.md:22 тАФ AC says `matchRunbook(description, runbooksDir)` but function takes `runbooks` (a pre-loaded array). Reword AC to match Technical Approach.

ЁЯЯб SPEC.md:23 тАФ AC wording "regex match correctly narrows candidate set before keyword scoring" implies two-phase filtering, but implementation uses single-phase additive scoring per the SPEC's own Technical Approach. Reword to "Regex and keyword patterns contribute additively to the runbook score."

ЁЯЯб test/cli-commands.test.mjs:266 тАФ No CLI-level integration test for `agt run --runbook nonexistent-id --dry-run`; only unit-level coverage exists. Add a CLI test that verifies the warning output.

ЁЯЯб test/runbooks.test.mjs тАФ No test for `--runbook` without a value (`agt run --runbook`). Silently falls through to auto-matching тАФ not harmful but confusing. Add a test asserting the fallthrough behavior.

ЁЯЯб bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:27 тАФ Custom YAML parser key regex `[a-zA-Z_]\w*` matches `__proto__`; a crafted YAML could theoretically pollute the result object's prototype. Risk is low (YAML files are project-owned, `castValue` returns only primitives). Add to backlog: use `Object.create(null)` for parsed objects.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:267` тАФ `include` mechanism has 1 consumer across all shipped runbooks. Explicitly spec'd, but track: if no additional include users appear, consider removing.
ЁЯЯб `bin/lib/runbooks.mjs:113` тАФ `isSafeRegex` heuristic over-broadly rejects all `(group|alternation)+` patterns, including benign ones like `(foo|bar)+`.
